title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Fair Isaac (FICO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.19% and 2.49%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: FICO Announces Earnings of $3.09 per Share for First Quarter Fiscal 2022
text: BOZEMAN, Mont., Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- FICO (NYSE:FICO), a leading predictive analytics and decision management software company, today announced results for its first fiscal quarter ended December 31, 2021.

title: Fair Isaac Corporation Announces Date for Reporting of First Quarter Fiscal 2022 Financial Results
text: BOZEMAN, Mont., Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- FICO (NYSE:FICO), a leading predictive analytics and decision management software company, will announce its first quarter fiscal 2022 results on January 27, 2022, after the market closes and will host a conference call on January 27 th at 5:00 p.m.

title: Ken Kertz of FICO Named as a Top 7 Auto Finance Innovator in 2021 Auto Finance Innovator Awards
text: BOZEMAN, Mont., Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- FICO, a leading applied intelligence company, announced today that Ken Kertz, Vice President of Transportation and Supply Chain, has been named a Top 7 Auto Finance Innovator for the Service Provider category in the 2021 Auto Finance Innovator Awards.

title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Fair Isaac Corporation - FICO
text: NEW YORK, Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Pomerantz LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Fair Isaac Corporation ("Fair Isaac" or the "Company") (NYSE: FICO).  The investigation concerns whether Fair Isaac and certain of its officers and/or directors have breached fiduciary duties owed to the company and its investors.

title: FICO Unites Software Business Under EVP Stephanie Covert to Accelerate Platform Strategy
text: BOZEMAN, Mont., Jan. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Global analytics software leader FICO today announced that Stephanie Covert has taken on an expanded role as executive vice president for software.

title: Wall Street Analysts See a 25% Upside in Fair Isaac (FICO): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
text: The consensus price target hints at a 25.2% upside potential for Fair Isaac (FICO). While empirical research shows that this sought-after metric is hardly effective, an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean that the stock will witness an upside in the near term.

title: Needham Names Fair Isaac Top Pick for 2022; Adds To Conviction List
text: Needham analyst Kyle Peterson raised the price target on Fair Isaac Corp (NYSE:FICO) to $590 from $550 and kept a Buy rating on the shares. The price target implies a 33% upside.
